cases.title: OrganizerAdmin views paginated registrations list for authorized event
preconditions: Event with multiple participant registrations in varied states
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with organization scope to the event
steps: Inspect response envelope and item ordering
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items, page=1, pageSize=20, total, totalPages; items sorted by updatedAt descending per API design default; operational registrations list scoped to the authorized event per FR-30

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin views paginated waitlist queue for authorized event
preconditions: Event at capacity with multiple waitlisted participants
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with event scope
steps: Verify waitlist position ordering and envelope metadata
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items ordered by position ascending per API design; total reflects full waitlist row count before paging; FIFO order preserved per FR-30a and AC-02f; satisfies FR-30 waitlist operational list requirement

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin views paginated attendance list for authorized event
preconditions: Event with at least one check-in record and absent participants
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with event scope
steps: Inspect attendance rows and pagination metadata
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items sorted by checkinAt descending per API design; operational attendance list returned for the authorized event per FR-30

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin views paginated eligibility list for authorized event
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated Eligible, NotEligible, and Revoked participants
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with event scope
steps: Verify each item includes eligibility result and reason fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items include Eligible, NotEligible, and Revoked rows with terminal result and non-empty reasonCode/reasonText; default sort participantId ascending per API design; FR-30 eligibility operational list available to authorized organizer admin

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin views paginated audit logs for authorized event
preconditions: Event with multiple audit log entries from critical configuration changes
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with event scope
steps: Verify ordering and envelope metadata against persistence row count
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items ordered by createdAt descending; total equals full matching audit row count per testing-plan §3 row: Audit logs paginated → ordered + total count (AC-13); audit operational list restricted to OrganizerAdmin per FR-30

cases.title: OrganizerStaff views operational registrations and waitlist on assigned event
preconditions: Event at capacity with registrations and waitlist entries
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 200 paginated envelopes; staff reads operational registrations and waitlist within assigned event scope per FR-30 and FR-27

cases.title: OrganizerStaff views attendance and eligibility lists on assigned event
preconditions: Completed event with check-in records and evaluated eligibility rows
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 200 paginated envelopes with correct default sorts; staff operational list access permitted for attendance and eligibility on assigned events per FR-30

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin filters registrations operational list by state
preconditions: Event with Registered and Waitlisted participants
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with event scope
steps: Verify every returned item has state Registered and total reflects filtered count
Verify every returned item has state Waitlisted and includes waitlistPosition
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope for each filter; Registered filter returns only Registered rows; Waitlisted filter returns only Waitlisted rows each with waitlistPosition per AC-18e; total and totalPages computed from filtered rows only; state filter supported on registrations operational list per API design

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin filters eligibility operational list by eligibility result
preconditions: Completed event with mix of Eligible, NotEligible, and Revoked participants
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: Verify every item has eligibility.result Eligible
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; all items have eligibility.result Eligible; NotEligible and Revoked rows excluded; eligibility filter supported on operational list per API design and page list segmented eligibility tabs

cases.title: Organizer operational tables render server-driven paginated rows
preconditions: Event with registrations, waitlist, attendance, or eligibility rows exceeding one page (default pageSize 20)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin or OrganizerStaff with event scope on organizer operational listing page
steps: Navigate to organizer registrations, waitlist, check-in attendance, or eligibility management page
Verify pagination controls and page metadata are visible
On registrations page with Waitlisted rows, verify waitlistPosition column is shown
Advance to page 2 using Next control and observe network requests
cases.expected: Table renders at most pageSize rows per page; prev/next controls update displayed rows; waitlistPosition column visible on Waitlisted registration rows per AC-18e; page change triggers paginated API request with updated page parameter per page list organizer sections and AC-14

cases.title: OrganizerStaff assigned events list is paginated and scoped
preconditions: OrganizerStaff assigned to multiple events (more than one page if possible)
Authenticated OrganizerStaff on assigned events list page
steps: Navigate to organizer staff assigned events list
Verify only assigned events appear in the table
Use pagination controls if multiple pages exist
cases.expected: Assigned events list shows only events in staff assignedEventIds; paginated table with server or scoped pagination per page list Organizer Staff pages; no unassigned events visible

cases.title: Operational list queries enforce organizer admin full scope and staff assignment scope at persistence boundary
preconditions: Postgres seeded with events evt-a, evt-b, evt-c and registrations on each
OrganizerStaff user assigned only to evt-a and evt-b
Real database test harness with transaction rollback per test
steps: Invoke operational list repository query for staff scoped to assignedEventIds [evt-a, evt-b]
Assert results include only registrations for evt-a and evt-b
Invoke same query path for OrganizerAdmin without assignment restriction
Assert admin query returns registrations across all organization events
cases.expected: Staff-scoped list query excludes unassigned event rows; admin query includes all organization events; scope enforced at module-DB boundary per FR-30 authorized event scope and FR-27

cases.title: Operational list endpoint returns single page within acceptable time when total exceeds 500 rows
preconditions: Database seeded with more than 500 rows for an organizer operational list endpoint (e.g. registrations or audit-logs)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with event scope
Performance threshold defined for acceptable response time
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 (or audit-logs with equivalent row count)
Measure response time and inspect items.length
cases.expected: HTTP 200 within acceptable response time per NFR-16; items.length <= pageSize; total reflects full row count without loading entire dataset in one response per testing-plan §3 row: Registrations list beyond capacity → never returns more than pageSize items (AC-13, NFR-16)

cases.title: Unauthenticated operational list request returns 401 before data exposure
preconditions: Event with registrations and other operational data
No Authorization header on request
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 401 unauthenticated; no operational list items returned; auth required per API principles and NFR-08 before organizer operational data access

cases.title: Participant denied access to organizer operational registrations list
preconditions: Event with multiple registrations
Valid Participant JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; paginated operational registrations list is organizer capability scoped to authorized roles per FR-30; no participant PII from other registrants exposed

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied operational lists on unassigned event
preconditions: Event with operational data that staff actor is not assigned to
OrganizerStaff JWT without eventId in assignedEventIds
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN or HTTP 404 when entity not in actor scope; no cross-event operational data returned; FR-30 lists scoped to authorized events enforced via FR-27

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied audit logs but permitted other operational lists on assigned event
preconditions: Assigned event with audit log entries and registrations
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
cases.expected: Audit logs request returns HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; registrations request returns HTTP 200 paginated envelope; audit operational list is admin-only while other FR-30 lists remain available to scoped staff per permission matrix

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters on operational list return 400 INVALID_PAGINATION
preconditions: Event with operational list data
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT
cases.expected: Each invalid request returns HTTP 400 with error.code INVALID_PAGINATION; no partial operational list data returned; pagination guardrails enforced per API design section 3

cases.title: Operational list page beyond totalPages returns empty items with valid metadata
preconditions: Event with exactly 25 registrations persisted in Postgres
Real database test harness with transaction rollback per test
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with event scope
steps: Invoke registration list query via registration module/service with page=1, pageSize=20 and record totalPages
Invoke same query with page={totalPages + 1}, pageSize=20
Compare returned items to direct COUNT and OFFSET/LIMIT expectations in persistence layer
cases.expected: Beyond-last-page response returns items=[], valid page and pageSize, total unchanged, and totalPages unchanged per AC-13; page 1 returns 20 items with total=25; module-integration boundary exercises real DB transaction without loading full unbounded dataset

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin browses paginated organizer events list with search, state filter, and sort
preconditions: Multiple events including at least one Draft and one RegistrationOpen with distinguishable names
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT
cases.expected: Each request returns HTTP 200 paginated envelope; Draft state filter includes Draft events visible to organizer admin; q search returns matching events by name/location/description; sort parameter changes ordering per API design; organizer events list supports search + state filter (includes Draft) + sort per FR-30 behavior and listing matrix

cases.title: Invalid eligibility filter on operational list returns 400 INVALID_INPUT
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility rows
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with event scope
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with error.code INVALID_INPUT; no partial eligibility list data returned; invalid eligibility enum rejected per API design section 3 and AC-10b
